PowerShell($r = $null; foreach \($i in 1..10\) { try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod http://127.0.0.1:8001/health -TimeoutSec 2; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } }; if \($null -ne $r\) { Write-Output "health: $\($r.status\) app: $\($r.app\)" } else { Write-Output "server did not respond" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { $p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($conn.OwningProcess\)"; Write-Output "pid $\($p.ProcessId\): $\($p.CommandLine\)" } else { Write-Output "nothing listening on 8000" })

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath C:\\innovaq\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -ArgumentList '-m','http.server','3100','--bind','127.0.0.1' -WorkingDirectory C:\\innovaq\\frontend -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; try { $cfg = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:3100/config.js" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "config.js -> $\($cfg.StatusCode\)"; foreach \($p in @\('/app/dashboard.html','/app/workflows.html','/app/templates.html','/auth/login.html','/auth/register.html'\)\) { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:3100$p" -UseBasicParsing; $hasCfg = $r.Content -match 'src="/config\\.js"'; $usesGlobal = $r.Content -match 'window\\.API_BASE_URL'; Write-Output "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\), loads config.js: $hasCfg, uses global: $usesGlobal" } } finally { Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -Confirm:$false })
